title.en: England claim third at World Cup with win in 10-goal thriller over France
title.zh-CN: 英格兰队以10球惊悚片击败法国队夺得世界杯第三名

summary.en: England nearly blew a four-goal lead against France as Bukayo Saka’s hat-trick gave the Three Lions a remarkable 6-4 bronze medal win in Miami to achieve their best World Cup finish since 1966.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰队几乎击败了法国队的四球领先优势，因为Bukayo Saka的帽子戏法让三狮队在迈阿密以6-4获得了非凡的铜牌，以实现自1966年以来的最佳世界杯成绩。

title.en: Golden Boot race: Mbappe pulls two clear of Messi
title.zh-CN: 黄金靴比赛：姆巴佩将两人拉离梅西

summary.en: Kylian Mbappe now leads the way in the Golden Boot race with 10 goals - two clear of Lionel Messi who plays in Sunday's World Cup final.
summary.zh-CN: 基利安·姆巴佩（ Kylian Mbappe ）现在以10个进球在金靴赛中领先，其中两个进球与周日世界杯决赛中的莱昂内尔·梅西（ Lionel Messi ）相差

title.en: How did England players rate during the World Cup?
title.zh-CN: 英格兰球员在世界杯期间的表现如何？

summary.en: BBC Sport England reporter Alex Howell assess how the Three Lions' players fared in North America.
summary.zh-CN: 英国广播公司体育英格兰记者亚历克斯·豪威尔（ Alex Howell ）评估了三狮队的球员在北美的表现。

title.en: Chelsea agree record £117m deal for Villa's Rogers
title.zh-CN: 切尔西同意与维拉的罗杰斯达成创纪录的1.17亿美元交易£

summary.en: Chelsea have agreed a club record £117m deal to sign England international midfielder Morgan Rogers from Aston Villa.
summary.zh-CN: 切尔西已经同意以1.17亿英镑的价格从阿斯顿维拉签下英格兰国际中场摩根·罗杰斯。

title.en: False nines or firing forwards - England's potential life after Kane
title.zh-CN: 假九或向前射击-凯恩之后英格兰的潜在生活

summary.en: Are England facing the prospect of using a false nine up front once record scorer Harry Kane calls time on his international career?
summary.zh-CN: 一旦得分王哈里·凯恩（ Harry Kane ）在国际职业生涯中拨打时间，英格兰是否会面临使用假九的前景？

title.en: The classroom moment that bonds finalists De la Fuente & Scaloni forever
title.zh-CN: 将决赛选手De la Fuente和Scaloni永远联系在一起的课堂时刻

summary.en: Spain manager Luis de la Fuente and Argentina boss Lionel Scaloni will go head-to-head in the World Cup final on Sunday - and the two men know each other well.
summary.zh-CN: 西班牙主教练路易斯·德拉富恩特和阿根廷主教练莱昂内尔·斯卡洛尼将在周日的世界杯决赛中正面交锋，两人彼此很熟悉。

title.en: A bit 'blah' or a worthy host? Is MetLife  right World Cup final choice?
title.zh-CN: 有点「胡说八道」或是一个值得尊敬的体验达人？大都会人寿的世界杯决赛选择是正确的吗？

summary.en: North America correspondent Nada Tawfik explores the decision to award the World Cup final to MetLife Stadium amid competition from rival venues.
summary.zh-CN: 北美记者纳达·陶菲克（ Nada Tawfik ）探讨了在竞争对手场馆的竞争中将世界杯决赛授予大都会人寿体育场的决定。

title.en: More games, more controversy - good and bad of biggest World Cup yet
title.zh-CN: 更多的比赛，更多的争议-迄今为止最大的世界杯的好坏

summary.en: From high ticket prices to hydration breaks, new laws and political interventions, there has rarely been a dull moment at the 2026 World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 从高门票价格到补水休息、新法律和政治干预， 2026年世界杯很少出现沉闷的时刻。

title.en: Huge rise in harmful social media posts this World Cup
title.zh-CN: 本届世界杯有害社交媒体帖子大幅增加

summary.en: There have been 14 times more harmful social media posts and comments during this World Cup than in 2022, Fifa finds.
summary.zh-CN: 国际足联发现，在本届世界杯期间，有害的社交媒体帖子和评论比2022年多了14倍。

title.en: World Cup winner Capdevila appeals to Trump after US travel permit denied
title.zh-CN: 世界杯冠军卡普德维拉在美国旅行许可证被拒绝后向特朗普提出上诉

summary.en: Former Spain international Joan Capdevila has made a plea to US President Donald Trump for help after he says he was denied a travel permit to enter the United States before  Sunday's World Cup final.
summary.zh-CN: 前西班牙国脚琼·卡普德维拉（ Joan Capdevila ）向美国总统唐纳德·特朗普（ Donald Trump ）请求帮助，因为他说他在周日世界杯决赛前被拒绝进入美国的旅行许可证。

title.en: Best finishers, defensive kings & runners - World Cup finalists in numbers
title.zh-CN: 最佳终结者、防守国王和跑步者-世界杯决赛选手

summary.en: European champions Spain will face World Cup holders and South American champions Argentina in the final. How do they compare? BBC Sport takes a look at the numbers.
summary.zh-CN: 欧洲冠军西班牙将在决赛中面对世界杯冠军和南美冠军阿根廷。它们的比较结果如何？英国广播公司体育台（ BBC Sport ）查看了这些数字。

title.en: 'They made him a defensive player' - Trump questions Kane role in semi
title.zh-CN: “他们让他成为一名防守球员” -特朗普质疑凯恩在半决赛中的角色

summary.en: US President Donald Trump joins criticism of England's tactics in their World Cup semi-final loss to Argentina, by questioning Harry Kane's second-half "defensive" role.
summary.zh-CN: 美国总统唐纳德特朗普通过质疑哈里凯恩的下半场“防守”角色，加入了对英格兰在世界杯半决赛输给阿根廷的战术的批评。

title.en: Tuchel and Saka react to England's remarkable bronze medal win vs France LIVE!
